title: Compensation & Benefits Specialist/Manager
description:
Your new company
You will be joining a well‑established multinational organisation in the advanced manufacturing sector. With a strong global presence and a reputation for quality and innovation, the company offers a collaborative workplace culture and the opportunity to contribute to impactful HR initiatives. The Singapore office provides a dynamic environment where HR professionals can grow their expertise and play a key role in shaping compensation and benefits strategies.

Your new role
As an HR Specialist/Manager (Compensation & Benefits), you will take ownership of developing, implementing, and managing total rewards strategies and performance management frameworks. This is a newly created role, offering the chance to build structures from the ground up and make a direct impact on the organisation with significant visibility and strategic impact.

Key responsibilities include:

  • Develop and manage salary structures, job grading, and reward programs.

  • Conduct benchmarking, market surveys, and equity reviews to ensure competitiveness.

  • Lead compensation reviews, including budgeting, merit increases, and bonus cycles.

  • Oversee employee benefits, vendor management, and contract negotiations.

  • Support performance management processes and partner with managers for consistency.

  • Provide insights and analytics on pay trends and effectiveness of reward programs.

What you’ll need to succeed
To thrive in this role, you should bring strong hands‑on Compensation & Benefits experience. You should have a proven track record in salary benchmarking, job evaluation, and establishing grading frameworks, along with experience in benefits management and vendor negotiations. Maturity, independence, and confidence to engage both leadership and various stakeholders will set you apart.

What you need to do now
If you’re interested in this role, click ‘apply now’ or forward an up‑to‑date copy of your CV to Joan.Yip@hays.com.sg. If this job isn’t quite right for you, but you’re exploring new opportunities, feel free to reach out for a confidential discussion about your career.

EA Reg Number: R22106377 | EA License Number: 07C3924 | Company Registration No: 200609504D

At Hays, we believe the right job can transform a person's life and the right person can transform a business. We're passionate about connecting our candidates with the right job for them.
